title: Supply Chain Manager - DHL India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - DHL India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DHL India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About DHL India:
DHL India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DHL India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
